allow: Bash(docker exec postgres psql -U admin -d ecommerce -c "SELECT stats_date, total_sales, total_events, unique_visitors FROM daily_statistics ORDER BY stats_date DESC LIMIT 15;")
Bash(docker exec postgres psql -U admin -d ecommerce -c "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM daily_statistics;")

Bash(docker exec postgres psql -U admin -d ecommerce -c "SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_days,
  MIN(stats_date) as earliest_date,
  MAX(stats_date) as latest_date,
  SUM(total_events) as total_events,
  AVG(total_events)::INT as avg_events_per_day,
  SUM(unique_visitors) as total_unique_visitors,
  AVG(unique_visitors)::INT as avg_visitors_per_day
FROM daily_statistics;")

Bash(docker exec postgres psql -U admin -d ecommerce -c "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT transactionid) as transactions FROM clickstream_events WHERE processed_at >= ''2015-06-03'' AND processed_at < ''2015-06-14'';")

Bash(docker exec postgres psql -U admin -d ecommerce -c "SELECT event, COUNT(*) as count FROM clickstream_events WHERE processed_at >= ''2015-06-03'' AND processed_at < ''2015-06-14'' GROUP BY event ORDER BY count DESC;")

Bash(docker exec postgres psql -U admin -d ecommerce -c "SELECT event, COUNT(*) FROM clickstream_events WHERE timestamp >= ''2015-06-03'' AND timestamp < ''2015-06-14'' GROUP BY event ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;")

Bash(docker exec postgres psql -U admin -d ecommerce -c "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT transactionid) as trans_count, COUNT(*) as total FROM clickstream_events WHERE event = ''transaction'' AND timestamp >= ''2015-06-03'' AND timestamp < ''2015-06-14'';")
Bash(docker exec postgres psql -U admin -d ecommerce -c "DELETE FROM daily_statistics WHERE stats_date >= ''2015-06-03'' AND stats_date <= ''2015-06-13'';")
